SessionStart.command: bash -c 'PROJ=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); LATEST=$(ls "$PROJ/.github/memory/session/"*.md 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Previous session context loaded from $LATEST:\\n$(cat $LATEST | head -60)\"}" ; fi'
